name: UN World Population Data Portal API
description: The United Nations Population Division Data Portal API provides access to comprehensive demographic data including population estimates and projections, fertility, mortality, and migration indicators for all countries and areas of the world. Data is sourced from the World Population Prospects and other UN Population Division publications.
